title.en: Of course, for the Immortal Realm Lord, it wasn...

content.en:
The quaint stele is not only a warning and introduction, but also an entrance into the prison.

Ye Tian's will hooked up with the stone stele, and his body was quickly engulfed by the stone stele.

Wow!

Ye Tian entered a void similar to the Void Zone, but he was even more lonely by the Void Zone, but there was still a trace of energy here, so the prisoner could keep his body at the peak here, but if he wanted to cultivate and improve his cultivation, he couldn't do it at all.

When Ye Tian entered here, he saw a tall Eternal Realm Lord, who was locked by invisible chains and seemed to have fallen into a state of self-silence.

But now, Ye Tian entered here, and the chains disappeared, and such a sign made the Eternal Realm Lord wake up.

This Eternal Realm Lord should be the Lord of Qishui mentioned on the stone tablet.

"It's been so many years, and finally another Immortal Realm Lord has come in, I'm so bored!!!"

Then, the Qishui Lord showed a hideous sneer, and his voice echoed in the void, as if it was incomparably infiltrating.

Of course, for the Immortal Realm Lord, it wasn't scary at all.

But the aura emanating from the Qishui Lord was extremely condensed, even close to madness, and it was definitely not an ordinary three-257-step Immortal Realm Lord.

Even if this place is not suitable for cultivation, it does not affect the comprehension of the Eternal Technique, and no one knows how many Eternal Techniques the Lord of Qishui has comprehended.

But soon, Ye Tian knew that as soon as the other party made a move, it was a legendary eternal skill.

Burst!

A black hand shattered the void and appeared in Ye Tian's position, and it was the Qishui Lord who made a move.

But this hand did not attack Ye Tian, and Ye Tian dodged in time with a void step.

"Will Slash Void Sword!"

Ye Tian did not hesitate at all, and performed this trick.

This Will Eternal Technique was extremely fast, but Lord Qishui's reaction was so fast that even the Will Slashing Void Sword dodged.

At this time, Ye Tian no longer underestimated the Qishui Lord.

If it had been replaced by other Immortal Realm Lords, he would have been hit hard by his blow.

Although the speed of the Qishui Lord is not as fast as Ye Tian, he has too much combat experience, and his moves are all legendary eternal skills, and almost every legendary eternal skill is created for battle, and it is perfectly coordinated, without a trace of mistakes.

However, Ye Tian had the Void True Body and the Void Step, and the Qishui Lord didn't want to hurt him at all.

At this time, Ye Tian could have cast a hundred million Void Heavy Void to severely damage the Qishui Lord, but the Qishui Lord was indeed a good sparring partner, so he didn't choose to do so, and he could still learn a lot from the Qishui Lord.

In such a prison, it is impossible to temper it directly, and when it comes to one, the prison is moved out, and then it cannot be re-entered for a short time, this is the rule of Moshan, unless this piece of heaven and earth is broken, and the way to change this kind of rule... Fortunately, there are many prisoners here at the level of the Immortal Realm Lord, so Ye Tian has no shortage of opponents.

Some of these opponents are slightly weaker, while others are extremely powerful.

However, there was only one Eternal Realm here, Ye Tian, and there were no other Immortal Realm Lords from the space-time territory.

There may be other Immortal Realm Lords here, but if their strength is too poor, they will easily be severely injured by the prisoners here, so they will not be able to temper at all, so they will not stay in the Moshan Prison here.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian sent another replica body to explore the Black Continent here and found six Immortal Realm Lords.

In addition to the Moshan Prison, there are several other opportunities in this black continent, such as a treasure place that can improve the will, which also has some effects on the Immortal Realm Lord, and a place where the Legendary Realm Lord cultivates, where there are traces of the Legendary Realm Lord, which is worth visiting.

Ye Tian went to see those places one after another, but for him, the most valuable place was the Moshan Prison.

In the following years, one of Ye Tian's replica bodies has been fighting with these Immortal Realm prisoners in Moshan Prison, gradually perfecting his legendary eternal skills, so that these legendary eternal skills can fit more perfectly, so that they can cooperate well and make their own strength exert a more powerful effect.

Moreover, from them, Ye Tian felt the true use of the Will Eternal Technique, which was an experience that many secret art inheritances could not learn at all.

Eternal years have passed, Ye Tian's strength has become stronger and stronger, even if he is still in the six-step immortal realm lord when he cultivates, his strength has increased several times.

After thousands of eternal years, Ye Tian didn't know how many battles he had experienced, almost innumerable.

At this point, there was no need to continue fighting these prisoners, and he was ready to kill them and obtain their treasures.

Even if these Immortal Realm prisoners were captured by Mo Shan, it was impossible for Mo Shan to completely clean up the treasures on their bodies, some of the treasures were hidden deeply, and unless they were killed, they would not be found at all.

Therefore, killing these Immortal Realm prisoners, as long as you find a treasure, you will make a lot of money, because it must not be an ordinary treasure.

this day.

Ye Tian entered the void of the Qishui Lord's prison, and he was about to kill the Qishui Lord.

"You're here again!"

Lord Qishui looked at Ye Tian coldly.

The battle began again.

But this time, Ye Tian directly cast a hundred million void and directly hit the Qishui Lord.

Immediately, Ye Tian went all out, even if his cultivation was suppressed to the same three-step immortal realm lord as the Qishui Lord, Ye Tian's combat power was much stronger than the Qishui Lord.

Lord Qishui was beaten by Ye Tian throughout the whole process, and he didn't have much strength to resist at all.

Soon, the Lord of Kisui was hit hard.

The point is that Moshan no longer exists, so there will be no strong Moshan to stop it.

Until the moment of death, Lord Qishui did not beg for mercy, and finally fell into Ye Tian's hands and turned into a corpse.

After killing the Qishui Lord, Ye Tian began to probe the treasure in his body.

"There's a treasure!"

Ye Tian found it.

Wow!

A drop of water flew out of the Qishui Lord and landed on Ye Tian's hand.

Although this water bead is not an eternal treasure, it is much more precious than a weapon like the Void Saint Soldier, and it can be called an eternal treasure.

Such an Eternal Kui Treasure is not a weapon, it can only be regarded as one of the strange things, and it is a strange thing at the level of the Eternal Realm.

After Ye Tian refined this water bead, he finally knew its usefulness.

【Kui Dzi: Nourishes the will and restores the power of the will】

Such a treasure is not bad, for example, the will of the Eternal Realm has been severely damaged, and it is a little troublesome to recover, but Kui Tianzhu can recover such an injury.

"Yes, I really don't have such a treasure, this time to get such an eternal treasure, it can be regarded as a big profit!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Then, he began to attack the second Immortal Realm prison. _
